title: Verify solution review page loads correctly
description: Verifies the solution review page loads for an authenticated user and shows questions with View Solution button hidden by default.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3004/login
Fill email field with rahulsriwastaw7643@gmail.com
Fill password field with 8863999370
Click the Sign In / Login button
Navigate to http://localhost:3004/ssc-cgl-test-series-demo/tests/730254712620cec16b456f6c/solutions?attemptNo=1
Verify the page loaded and shows a question with a 'View Solution' button visible
Verify the correct answer options are NOT highlighted before clicking View Solution

title: Language switcher changes question display text
description: Verifies clicking the VIEW IN dropdown and switching between English and Hindi changes what is displayed in the question area.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3004/login
Fill email field with rahulsriwastaw7643@gmail.com
Fill password field with 8863999370
Click the Sign In / Login button
Navigate to http://localhost:3004/ssc-cgl-test-series-demo/tests/730254712620cec16b456f6c/solutions?attemptNo=1
Wait for the page to load and locate the VIEW IN dropdown in the top-right header
Record the current question text displayed on screen
Change the VIEW IN dropdown to 'Hindi' if it's on English, or to 'English' if it's on Hindi
Verify the VIEW IN dropdown now shows the newly selected language
Check if the question text on screen has changed after switching language - take screenshot for comparison

title: View Solution reveals correct answer and explanation
description: Verifies clicking View Solution button reveals the correct option highlighted and shows the explanation text below.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3004/login
Fill email field with rahulsriwastaw7643@gmail.com
Fill password field with 8863999370
Click the Sign In / Login button
Navigate to http://localhost:3004/ssc-cgl-test-series-demo/tests/730254712620cec16b456f6c/solutions?attemptNo=1
Click the 'View Solution' button visible for question 1
Verify at least one option is now highlighted in green (correct answer)
Verify a solution/explanation section appears below the options

title: Language switch in Hindi mode renders question in Hindi script
description: Verifies the VIEW IN dropdown works and when set to Hindi, the question body renders using the textHi field from the API.

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3004/login
Fill email field with rahulsriwastaw7643@gmail.com
Fill password field with 8863999370
Click the Sign In / Login button
Navigate to http://localhost:3004/ssc-cgl-test-series-demo/tests/730254712620cec16b456f6c/solutions?attemptNo=1
Locate the VIEW IN dropdown in the top-right area of the header bar
Set VIEW IN dropdown to 'Hindi'
Verify the VIEW IN dropdown value shows Hindi
Set VIEW IN dropdown back to 'English'
Verify the VIEW IN dropdown value shows English and the page is still functional
